lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੇ ਸਾਸ ਸਾਸ ਹੈ ਜੇਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਬਿਰਹਿ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਹਰਿ ਬੀਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: jan ke saas saas hai jete har bireh prabhoo har beedhe |
lines.english: Each and every breath of the Lord's humble servant is pierced through with love of the Lord God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਜਪਿਓ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਨਰਹਰਿ ਉਪਦੇਸਿ ਗੁਰੂ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰੀਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: jan japio naam niranjan narahar upades guroo har preedhe |
lines.english: The Lord's humble servant chants the Immaculate Naam, the Name of the Lord; through the Guru's Teachings, the Lord reveals Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਜਲ ਕਮਲ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਅਤਿ ਭਾਰੀ ਬਿਨੁ ਜਲ ਦੇਖੇ ਸੁਕਲੀਧੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau jal kamal preet at bhaaree bin jal dekhe sukaleedhe |2|
lines.english: As the lotus is totally in love with the water and withers away without seeing the water, so am I in love with the Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮ ਜਨਮ ਕੀ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਲੁ ਨਿਕਸੀ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਲਿ ਨੀਧੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: janam janam kee haumai mal nikasee har amrit har jal needhe |3|
lines.english: The filth of egotism which stained me for countless lifetimes has been washed away, by the Ambrosial Water of the Ocean of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਭਾਵੈ ਸੁਣਿ ਬਿਨਉ ਬੇਨਤੀ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਰਣਿ ਪਵੀਧੇ ॥੪॥੩॥੫॥
lines.translit: har bhaavai sun binau benatee jan naanak saran paveedhe |4|3|5|
lines.english: O Lord, if it pleases You, hear my prayer; servant Nanak seeks Your Sanctuary. ||4||3||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮਰੇ ਕਰਮ ਨ ਬਿਚਰਹੁ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਤੁਮੑ ਪੈਜ ਰਖਹੁ ਅਪਨੀਧੇ ॥
lines.translit: hamare karam na bicharahu tthaakur tuma paij rakhahu apaneedhe |
lines.english: Please, do not take my karma into account, O my Lord and Master; please save the honor of Your slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹਿੰਡੋਲ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: basant hinddol mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Basant Hindol, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਭਰਮਿ ਭਰਮਿ ਬਹੁ ਧਾਵੈ ਤਿਲੁ ਘਰਿ ਨਹੀ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: man khin khin bharam bharam bahu dhaavai til ghar nahee vaasaa paaeeai |
lines.english: Each and every moment, my mind roams and rambles, and runs all over the place. It does not stay in its own home, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਿ ਅੰਕਸੁ ਸਬਦੁ ਦਾਰੂ ਸਿਰਿ ਧਾਰਿਓ ਘਰਿ ਮੰਦਰਿ ਆਣਿ ਵਸਾਈਐ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: gur ankas sabad daaroo sir dhaario ghar mandar aan vasaaeeai |1|
lines.english: But when the bridle of the Shabad, the Word of God, is placed over its head, it returns to dwell in its own home. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਗਇਆ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਸਹਜਿ ਸਮਾਧਿ ਲਗਾਈਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: haumai rog geaa sukh paaeaa har sehaj samaadh lagaaeeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am cured of the disease of egotism, and I have found peace; I have intuitively entered into the state of Samaadhi. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਜੀਉ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: gobind jeeo satasangat mel har dhiaaeeai |
lines.english: O Dear Lord of the Universe, lead me to join the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, so that I may meditate on You, Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਰਤਨ ਲਾਲ ਬਹੁ ਮਾਣਕ ਲਾਦੇ ਮਨੁ ਭ੍ਰਮਿਆ ਲਹਿ ਨ ਸਕਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: ghar ratan laal bahu maanak laade man bhramiaa leh na sakaaeeai |
lines.english: This house is loaded with countless gems, jewels, rubies and emeralds, but the wandering mind cannot find them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨ ਐਸਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਧੁ ਨ ਪਾਇਆ ਤੇ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਧ੍ਰਿਗੁ ਨਰ ਜੀਵਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: jin aisaa satigur saadh na paaeaa te dhrig dhrig nar jeevaaeeai |
lines.english: Those who do not find such a Holy True Guru - cursed, cursed are the lives of those people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਓਡਾ ਕੂਪੁ ਗੁਹਜ ਖਿਨ ਕਾਢੈ ਤਿਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਵਸਤੁ ਲਹਾਈਐ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jiau oddaa koop guhaj khin kaadtai tiau satigur vasat lahaaeeai |2|
lines.english: As the water-diviner finds the hidden water, and the well is then dug in an instant, so do we find the object of the Name through the True Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨਮੁ ਪਦਾਰਥੁ ਪੁੰਨਿ ਫਲੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਉਡੀ ਬਦਲੈ ਜਾਈਐ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: janam padaarath pun fal paaeaa kauddee badalai jaaeeai |3|
lines.english: The treasure of this human life is obtained when one's virtues bear fruit, but it is lost in exchange for a mere shell. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਧੁਸੂਦਨ ਹਰਿ ਧਾਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਗੁਰੂ ਮਿਲਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: madhusoodan har dhaar prabh kirapaa kar kirapaa guroo milaaeeai |
lines.english: O Lord God, please be merciful to me; be merciful, and lead me to meet the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਿਰਬਾਣ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈਐ ॥੪॥੪॥੬॥
lines.translit: jan naanak nirabaan pad paaeaa mil saadhoo har gun gaaeeai |4|4|6|
lines.english: Servant Nanak has attained the state of Nirvaanaa; meeting with the Holy people, he sings the Glorious Praises of the Lord. ||4||4||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣੁ ਭਇਆ ਦੁਖੁ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਦੇਹ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਸੁੰਞੀ ਸੁੰਞੁ ॥
lines.translit: aavan jaan bheaa dukh bikhiaa deh manamukh sunyee suny |
lines.english: Coming and going, he suffers the pains of vice and corruption; the body of the self-willed manmukh is desolate and vacant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਸੰਤੁ ਹਿੰਡੋਲ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: basant hinddol mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Basant Hindol, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਮ ਨਾਮੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਪਲੁ ਨਹੀ ਚੇਤਿਆ ਜਮਿ ਪਕਰੇ ਕਾਲਿ ਸਲੁੰਞੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raam naam khin pal nahee chetiaa jam pakare kaal saluny |1|
lines.english: He does not dwell on the Lord's Name, even for an instant, and so the Messenger of Death seizes him by his hair. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਮਿਲਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਭੁੰਞੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat gur kee har piaaree mil sangat har ras bhuny |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The Sat Sangat, Guru's True Congregation is so dear to the Lord. So join the Sangat, and taste the sublime essence of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੋਬਿੰਦ ਜੀਉ ਬਿਖੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਮਤਾ ਮੁੰਞੁ ॥
lines.translit: gobind jeeo bikh haumai mamataa muny |
lines.english: O Dear Lord of the Universe, please rid me of the poison of egotism and attachment.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਸਾਧ ਦਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਮੇਲਹੁ ਸਰਣਾਗਤਿ ਸਾਧੂ ਪੰਞੁ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat saadh deaa kar melahu saranaagat saadhoo pany |
lines.english: Please be kind to me, and unite me with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation of the Holy; I seek the Sanctuary of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਮ ਡੁਬਦੇ ਪਾਥਰ ਕਾਢਿ ਲੇਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਤੁਮੑ ਦੀਨ ਦਇਆਲ ਦੁਖ ਭੰਞੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: ham ddubade paathar kaadt lehu prabh tuma deen deaal dukh bhany |2|
lines.english: I am a heavy stone, sinking down - please lift me up and pull me out! O God, Merciful to the meek, You are the Destroyer of sorrow. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਉਸਤਤਿ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਰਿਦ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਸੁਆਮੀ ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਬੁਧਿ ਲੰਞੁ ॥
lines.translit: har usatat dhaarahu rid antar suaamee satasangat mil budh lany |
lines.english: I enshrine the Praises of my Lord and Master within my heart; joining the Sat Sangat, my intellect is enlightened.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਹਮ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਲਗਾਨੀ ਹਮ ਹਰਿ ਵਿਟਹੁ ਘੁਮਿ ਵੰਞੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har naamai ham preet lagaanee ham har vittahu ghum vany |3|
lines.english: I have fallen in love with the Lord's Name; I am a sacrifice to the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਕੇ ਪੂਰਿ ਮਨੋਰਥ ਹਰਿ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੇਵਹੁ ਹਰਿ ਲੰਞੁ ॥
lines.translit: jan ke poor manorath har prabh har naam devahu har lany |
lines.english: O Lord God, please fulfill the desires of Your humble servant; please bless me with Your Name, O Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਅਨਦੁ ਭਇਆ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਮੰਤ੍ਰੁ ਦੀਓ ਹਰਿ ਭੰਞੁ ॥੪॥੫॥੭॥੧੨॥੧੮॥੭॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: jan naanak man tan anad bheaa hai gur mantru deeo har bhany |4|5|7|12|18|7|37|
lines.english: Servant Nanak's mind and body are filled with ecstasy; the Guru has blessed him with the Mantra of the Lord's Name. ||4||5||7||12||18||7||37||
